title: Alternative Eva Soundtrack
wikitext:
[]: Alternative Eva Soundtrack.             Quote Post by The Sandman » Wed Aug 03, 2005 5:10 am Personally when it comes to the music for the series is just to lame for my taste. So here's the question. What artist and song you put in your personalized soundtrack.Here's mines. Godsmack-I Stand Alone(theme song) Korn-I Did My Time Limp Bizkit-The Truth Fabolus-Breathe Disturbed-The Sickness A Perfect Circle-Imagine(ending song) I think Asuka will like the Disturbed song.

[]: Re: Alternative Eva Soundtrack.             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Aug 03, 2005 5:18 am The Sandman wrote: Personally when it comes to the music for the series is just to lame for my taste. So here's the question. What artist and song you put in your personalized soundtrack.Here's mines. Godsmack-I Stand Alone(theme song) Korn-I Did My Time Limp Bizkit-The Truth Fabolus-Breathe Disturbed-The Sickness A Perfect Circle-Imagine(ending song) I think Asuka will like the Disturbed song.

[]: Re: Alternative Eva Soundtrack.             Quote Post by Space Penis » Wed Aug 03, 2005 7:04 am The Sandman wrote: Personally when it comes to the music for the series is just to lame for my taste.

[]: Re: Alternative Eva Soundtrack.             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Wed Aug 03, 2005 2:08 pm The Sandman wrote: Personally when it comes to the music for the series is just to lame for my taste. So here's the question. What artist and song you put in your personalized soundtrack.Here's mines. Godsmack-I Stand Alone(theme song) Korn-I Did My Time Limp Bizkit-The Truth Fabolus-Breathe Disturbed-The Sickness A Perfect Circle-Imagine(ending song) I think Asuka will like the Disturbed song.

[]:             Quote Post by The Sandman » Wed Aug 03, 2005 8:37 pm Carl Horn wrote: When it comes to EVA, I'm more old grunge than nu metal. Anno is Kurt, man. ANNO IS KURT MAN!!! Except he married to a woman addicted to steak instead of smack

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Wed Aug 03, 2005 9:09 pm The Sandman wrote: Carl Horn wrote: When it comes to EVA, I'm more old grunge than nu metal. Anno is Kurt, man. ANNO IS KURT MAN!!! Except he married to a woman addicted to steak instead of smack

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Aug 03, 2005 9:42 pm The Sandman wrote: The real reason why I stop listening Nirvana because my dad is a huge fan and his in his 40's. :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by The Sandman » Wed Aug 03, 2005 9:50 pm Look I was 8 when Kurt shot himself in 94 and beside dad and I are diffent as day and night. He like basketball, I'm into hockey. He loves classic cars, I'm to Harleys and sports bikes. So you really can't blame me.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Aug 03, 2005 10:14 pm Actually you sound quite similar. You both like automobiles and sports. And Nirvana it would seem. Perhaps you are being too hasty here?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 04, 2005 12:00 am My Dad's into Gymnastics. I'm into Ice Hockey. But on topic... I never really liked the music in Eva. I like some tracks, but I contend that Marilyn Manson and Nine Inch Nails are more appropriate than Sagisu Shiro's music. I even have a mix cd by Hexon that I listen to more than any Eva album.

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Thu Aug 04, 2005 11:53 am The Sandman wrote: Look I was 8 when Kurt shot himself in 94 and beside dad and I are diffent as day and night. He like basketball, I'm into hockey. He loves classic cars, I'm to Harleys and sports bikes. So you really can't blame me.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Thu Aug 04, 2005 2:53 pm Yeah, Pretty much. To make this non-spam, I would say that an alternate soundtrack would be better with 90's alty grunge because that was the music for the time, for us westerners anyway, and it does oh so seem to fit. BTW, Anno IS Kurdt!

[]:             Quote Post by Jomei » Thu Aug 04, 2005 3:19 pm I thought the classical music selections later in the series and in End of Evangelion were very appropriate.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Aug 04, 2005 4:32 pm I even have a mix cd by Hexon that I listen to more than any Eva album.

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Fri Aug 05, 2005 1:29 pm anatrok wrote: Yeah, Pretty much. To make this non-spam, I would say that an alternate soundtrack would be better with 90's alty grunge because that was the music for the time, for us westerners anyway, and it does oh so seem to fit. BTW, Anno IS Kurdt!
